Research and Project Development Directorate

Okan Homepage

Research

Research and Projects Development Directorate

MENU

Why ARPROGED?

We work in a fast, dynamic, effective and solution-oriented manner to contribute to the R&D potential, the ability to produce projects and research, and to support the scientific studies of researchers at Istanbul Okan University.

Event

We lighten the burden of researchers in the project design and commercialization processes of your ideas and develop different business models together.

Governance Oriented Team

In order for the faculty members of our university to focus on their research and projects, we direct academic knowledge to funding and commercialization with our teammates, each with a focus on cooperation in their field.

Solution Oriented

We bring you together with the appropriate cooperation partners to develop your projects and support you for the right type of funding.

Sectoral Experience

We bring you together with our academics who can contribute with their R&D skills and scientific studies.
